summary: The new keyframes show a refrigerator with a paper attached (likely by a magnet), but they still do not show the dishwasher. I can describe the setup near the magnet (on the fridge), but cannot list major objects around the dishwasher without another view that includes it.

payload.answer:
I still can’t list the major objects around the dishwasher because the dishwasher is not visible in the provided frames. 

Near the magnet: the setup appears to be a white refrigerator with a paper/note posted on the upper door (likely attached by a magnet), and there is a small white table/cabinet positioned next to the refrigerator on its left side (frames 1–2, table/cabinet visible in frame 1).
supporting_claims: The newly provided views show a refrigerator with a paper/note posted on its upper door (frames 1–2).
A small white table/cabinet is directly beside the refrigerator (frame 1).
No dishwasher is visible in the provided frames, so objects around it cannot be confirmed from pixels.

uncertainties: Dishwasher is still not visible in frames 1–2; only the refrigerator area is shown.
The object holding the paper on the fridge is not clearly visible as a distinct magnet (paper is visible, attachment method unclear).
Need a wider kitchen view including under-counter appliances (dishwasher) and the fridge/magnet relationship.

evidence_items.claim: Frames 1–2 show a white refrigerator/freezer with a sheet of paper posted on the upper door (likely held by a magnet).
Frame 1 shows a small white table/cabinet next to the refrigerator.

tool_input.request_text: Need additional keyframes showing the dishwasher front/door area and the magnet (likely on fridge or appliance) to describe objects around dishwasher and setup near magnet. Current frame shows sink/counter but not a dishwasher or any magnet clearly.

tool_trace.response_text: Added 2 new keyframe(s) for objects: [17, 33, 20, 41, 45]. New view IDs: [183, 159]. Total keyframes now: 3.
